content.text: Both SparkPi jobs are currently running. Let's apply the three fixes now while they run.

input.command:
kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o yaml
echo "---"
kubectl describe deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history

content.content:
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1","kind":"RoleBinding","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-role-binding","namespace":"spark-team-a"},"roleRef":{"apiGroup":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io","kind":"Role","name":"spark-role"},"subjects":[{"kind":"ServiceAccount","name":"spark","namespace":"default"}]}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T02:03:05Z"
  name: spark-role-binding
  namespace: spark-team-a
  resourceVersion: "34656"
  uid: 8dcb456b-f841-447e-a70c-4c79f0a31d76
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: spark-role
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: spark
  namespace: default
---
Name:                   spark-history-server
Namespace:              spark-history
CreationTimestamp:      Fri, 10 Jul 2026 02:03:10 +0000
Labels:                 <none>
Annotations:            deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: 1
Selector:               app=spark-history-server
Replicas:               1 desired | 1 updated | 1 total | 0 available | 1 unavailable
StrategyType:           RollingUpdate
MinReadySeconds:        0
RollingUpdateStrategy:  25% max unavailable, 25% max surge
Pod Template:
  Labels:           app=spark-history-server
  Service Account:  spark
  Containers:
   spark-history-server:
    Image:      apache/spark:3.5.3
    Port:       18080/TCP (http)
    Host Port:  0/TCP (http)
    Command:
      /opt/spark/bin/spark-class
      org.apache.spark.deploy.history.HistoryServer
    Limits:
      cpu:     500m
      memory:  1Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:     100m
      memory:  512Mi
    Environment:
      SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS:  -Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/wrong/path/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080
      SPARK_NO_DAEMONIZE:  true
    Mounts:
      /mnt/spark-logs from spark-logs (rw)
  Volumes:
   spark-logs:
    Type:          PersistentVolumeClaim (a reference to a PersistentVolumeClaim in the same namespace)
    ClaimName:     spark-history-pvc-wrong
    ReadOnly:      false
  Node-Selectors:  <none>
  Tolerations:     <none>
Conditions:
  Type           Status  Reason
  ----           ------  ------
  Available      False   MinimumReplicasUnavailable
  Progressing    True    ReplicaSetUpdated
OldReplicaSets:  <none>
NewReplicaSet:   spark-history-server-7d9cf669b6 (1/1 replicas created)
Events:
  Type    Reason             Age   From                   Message
  ----    ------             ----  ----                   -------
  Normal  ScalingReplicaSet  45s   deployment-controller  Scaled up replica set spark-history-server-7d9cf669b6 to 1

content.text: Confirmed all three issues. Let's verify the actual PVC exists, then apply the three fixes.

content.content:
NAME                STATUS    VOLUME   CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   VOLUMEATTRIBUTESCLASS   AGE
spark-history-pvc   Pending                                      standard       <unset>                 48s

tool_use_result.stdout:
NAME                STATUS    VOLUME   CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   VOLUMEATTRIBUTESCLASS   AGE
spark-history-pvc   Pending                                      standard       <unset>                 48s

input.command:
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]'

kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]'

kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"
